subject: [PATCH v3 4/5] io_uring/rsrc: rename and export IO_IMU_DEST / IO_IMU_SOURCE

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch renames and exports two io_uring flags, IO_IMU_DEST and IO_IMU_SOURCE, to more descriptive names, IO_BUF_DEST and IO_BUF_SOURCE. The rename is necessary because callers may need the buffer to be both readable and writable. The flags are exported so that other subsystems can use them. The patch updates several files, including io_uring_types.h, io_uring.c, rsrc.c, and rsrc.h, making changes such as adding new enum values, updating BUILD_BUG_ON macros, and modifying code to use the new flag names.
